reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_disagreement:
Daily-and-forever vs cycled-twice-yearly. Hunter email 2025-10-07 ss-31-deep-dive prescribes "8-12 weeks ON, 8-12 weeks OFF" as the operative cycle and Taylor (daNiphOh5CM 00:17:43.950) does "five milligrams and I do it eight weeks on eight week off cycle." Trevor (PuLbLeS4xDk 00:33:38.000) instead says "You run a cycle of SS31 once or twice a year to perform a top to bottom refurbishment" — markedly less frequent than Hunter's 2-3x/year. Yet within the same channel, Trevor (lAdPLuyggFw 00:28:34.320): "You add the SS-31 every day because you cannot fix the cracked foundations of a factory while it's running outdated, inefficient machinery at full throttle" — and Trevor (lDiaf7q67vg 00:24:59.360) lists "SS31 2 mg" in his personal daily stack. Trevor's own corpus splits between daily-low and twice-yearly-burst depending on which episode.

Healthy-low vs therapeutic-high dose. Hunter (2025-10-07 ss-31-deep-dive): "Healthy optimization 1-2 mg/day subQ once daily" vs "Therapeutic / sick 5-10 mg/day subQ once daily." Trevor's personal daily stack (lDiaf7q67vg 00:24:59.360): "SS31 2 mg" — agrees with Hunter's healthy band. But Trevor (Fj9_wLXso1c 00:19:22.600) for therapeutic context: "Add in SS-31, 5 to 10 milligrams every day, hypothetically." Taylor (daNiphOh5CM 00:17:43.950): "five milligrams and I do it eight weeks on eight week off cycle" — and Taylor (URy1rzYi_hg 00:11:30.430): "for ss31 I'm going to do 5 milligrams of that twice a week" — Taylor's own two videos disagree on weekly frequency (daily continuous in 2024-08-09 vs twice-weekly in 2024-10-08). Hunter podcast guest Dr Abid Husain (JFrn_zX0RE4 00:59:25.840): "the dose usually ends up being higher than what we think. Um, probably on order of 20, you know, 20 milligrams a day" — far above any of Hunter/Taylor/Trevor's own numbers; surfaced because it appears on Hunter's channel even though it is the guest's voice.

Newer overrides older within Hunter's own corpus. Older Hunter email 2025-03-06 reversing-mitochondrial-aging: "Standard Dose: 2mg per day (5 days per week)" + "Higher Dose: 2.5mg per day (for those optimizing aggressively)." Hunter email 2025-07-25 ss-31-in-human-trials: "Use 0.5mg to 2mg per day ... subcutaneously in the morning" + "doses up to 10mg per day can be used safely, as seen in human trials."
